title: Electricity Demand Definitions Data table (ED2) 2025
description: The FES: Pathways to Net Zero represent a range of different, credible ways to decarbonise our energy system as we strive towards the 2050 target. One of the FES outputs is an agreed set of data tables containing the GB FES values for electricity demand. Definitions for the ED1 table are included in this dataset. This file is the 2025 version of these definitions.
